page_content:
DANC488 Project-Based Learning (3 Credits)

A specific project, is addressed, in dance from the perspectives of the investigator, the creator/choreographer, and the performer. Projects are cross-disciplinary and/or cross-cultural, and may involve both on- and off- campus experiences.

Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Dance department.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
